title: Recruiter Screens, Written Communication, and Process Control · Hiring Signal Forensics
summary: A realistic recruiter screens, written communication, and process control artifact contains one plausible targeting, evidence, integrity, access, privacy, process, or decision defect. Locate the first unsupported claim before revising it. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in screening conversation and process record and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and e…
objectives: Deliver a flexible evidence-grounded introduction connecting target work, relevant behavior, proof, and reason for this conversation.
Clarify ambiguous role, level, process, location, schedule, compensation, work sample, and decision criteria before answering.
Respond to irrelevant, sensitive, or jurisdiction-dependent questions by protecting privacy, redirecting to job function, and seeking qualified local guidance when needed.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Concise Introduction
steps.instruction:
debug case — A rushed screen mixes role evidence, pay, location, authorization, access, sensitive history, unclear process, and an implied but unconfirmed next step. The debug variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Deliver a flexible evidence-grounded introduction connecting target work, relevant behavior, proof, and reason for this conversation.

Inspect the Concise Introduction trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Concise Introduction.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for deliver a flexible evidence-grounded introduction connecting target work, relevant behavior, proof, and reason for this conversation. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Concise Introduction, keep Concise Introduction connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: For Concise Introduction, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim fails the evidence boundary for Concise Introduction.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Screen Close

Append a career-screen-close-f2uhvw: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
